chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D – 19 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.41/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 08.01.2024 Mr. Yousuf Ali, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zafar Hussain advocate holding brief for Mr. Pervaiz Memon advocate for the respondent............. As recorded in the last order, precise grievance of the petitioner is that a decision on his appeal was reserved for judgment by the Collector Customs (Appeals), Karachi on 05.12.2023, and in the meantime the bank account of the petitioner continues to be under attachment. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he would be satisfied if a direction to the Collector Customs is given to pass judgment expeditiously. Accordingly the petition is disposed of with a direction to the Collector Customs to decide the case of the petitioner within a period of twenty days or so. J U D G E J U D G E
